title: WestAir and Nikkiso to Build Multi-Use Hydrogen Fuel Station Designed to Deliver Near-Zero Boil-Off Losses
content: Nikkiso Clean Energy & Industrial Gases Group (Nikkiso CE&IG) and WestAir have announced today that they are building a hybrid hydrogen trailer and fueling station designed to reduce boil-off gas losses close to zero. While hydrogen fueling stations have been built across the world â€“ including more than 35 by Nikkiso CE&IG â€“ the project in Long Beach, California being led by independent gas distributor WestAir and Nikkiso CE&IG will both fuel vehicles directly via an H35 dispenser and also fill trailers for onward distribution.
author: Analysts Account
